channel.title: AfroTools Blog
channel.description: Expert guides on African tax, PAYE, currency, business, and finance. Practical articles for professionals across Nigeria, Kenya, South Africa, Ghana and more.

item.title: Nigeria Employer Payroll Compliance 2026 | PAYE, Pension, NSITF and ITF Guide
item.description: Nigeria employer payroll compliance guide for 2026 covering PAYE remittance, annual returns, pension, NSITF, ITF, NHF and monthly payroll controls reviewed on July 5, 2026.

item.title: Seed Rate and Planting Density in Africa 2026
item.description: Source-checked seed rate and planting-density guide for African farms, with maize, rice, cassava and tool handoffs for seed quantity, yield and farm budgets.

item.title: Namibia PAYE Tax 2026 | NamRA Bands, SSC and Filing Guide
item.description: Namibia PAYE guide checked July 4, 2026 covering NamRA salary tax bands, N$100,000 threshold, SSC checks, annual filing and payroll controls.

item.title: Scholarship Application Documents for African Students 2026
item.description: Source-checked scholarship application document checklist for African students, with PDF packet workflow, references, transcripts, ID, translations and deadline controls.

item.title: Lesotho PAYE Tax 2026/27 | RSL Rates, Tax Credit and Employer Filing Guide
item.description: Lesotho PAYE guide checked July 3, 2026 covering RSL 2026/27 rates, the M1,020 monthly tax credit, employer remittance, filing dates and payroll controls.

item.title: Customs Clearance Documents in Africa 2026
item.description: A broker-ready customs clearance document checklist for African importers in 2026, with official source checks, demurrage risk controls and AfroTools trade workflow links.

item.title: Eswatini Employer Payroll Compliance 2026 | ERS PAYE and ENPF Guide
item.description: Eswatini payroll compliance guide checked July 2, 2026 covering ERS PAYE, ENPF 2026 contribution ceiling, monthly filing dates, part-time employee tax and payroll controls.

item.title: Botswana VAT Remote Services 2026 | BURS Registration and Filing Guide
item.description: Botswana VAT guide checked July 1, 2026 covering BURS registration thresholds, remote services, 14% VAT, filing due dates, import VAT and source conflicts to verify.

item.title: Import Cost Checklist for African Small Businesses
item.description: A practical import-cost checklist for African sellers and small businesses: HS code, invoice value, freight, insurance, duty, VAT, documents and landed-cost handoff.

item.title: PDF Workflow for Job Applications, School Forms and Business Documents
item.description: Build a private PDF workflow for African job applications, school forms, HR packets and business documents using local-first AfroTools PDF tools.

item.title: South Africa Filing Season 2026 Dates | SARS Auto Assessment Guide
item.description: South Africa Filing Season 2026 guide with SARS auto assessment dates, ITR12 deadlines, provisional taxpayer dates, trusts, WhatsApp changes, and checklist steps verified on June 10, 2026.

item.title: Kenya Income Tax Return Deadline 2026 | KRA June 30 Guide
item.description: Kenya 2025 income tax return guide for the June 30, 2026 KRA deadline, eTIMS expense validation, P9 checks, side income, nil returns, default assessments, and iTax filing.

item.title: Mauritius VAT Guide 2026 | MRA Threshold, 15% Rate and Digital Services
item.description: Mauritius VAT guide for 2026 covering the 15% MRA rate, Rs 3 million registration threshold, filing deadlines, VAT invoices, repayments, and foreign digital services rules verified on June 17, 2026.

item.title: Malawi VAT Digital Services 2026 | 17.5% Rate, EIS and MK50m Threshold
item.description: Malawi VAT digital services guide for 2026 covering the 17.5% MRA rate, MK50 million VAT threshold, EIS invoicing, foreign digital services and filing controls verified on June 17, 2026.

item.title: Nigeria Withholding Tax 2026 | WHT Rates, Exemptions and Filing
item.description: Current Nigeria withholding tax guide for 2026 with WHT rates, small-business exemptions, TIN rules, remittance deadlines, certificates, treaty checks and invoice workflow verified on June 17, 2026.

item.title: South Africa Electricity Tariffs 2026/27 | Eskom, Municipal Bills and Prepaid Checks
item.description: South Africa electricity tariff guide checked June 18, 2026 with Eskom 8.76%, municipal 9.01%, prepaid, fixed-charge and bill-estimator checks.

item.title: Tanzania VAT Guide 2026 | TRA Registration, 18% VAT, EFDs and Filing Controls
item.description: Official-source Tanzania VAT guide for 2026. Understand the 18% standard VAT rate, 0% exports, TZS 100 million annual threshold, EFD workflow, 2025 Finance Act changes, and calculator checks.

item.title: Tanzania Employer Payroll Compliance 2026 | PAYE, NSSF, SDL and WCF
item.description: Tanzania employer payroll compliance guide for 2026 covering TRA PAYE, NSSF, SDL, WCF, filing controls, source checks and payroll review steps verified on May 21, 2026.

item.title: Zimbabwe VAT Guide 2026 | ZIMRA 15.5% Rate, Fiscal Invoices and TaRMS
item.description: Zimbabwe VAT guide for 2026 covering ZIMRA's 15.5% rate, TaRMS return notices, fiscal tax invoice rules, input tax checks, digital services tax and stale 15% claims.

item.title: Rwanda Digital VAT 2026 | Online Services and Platform Rules
item.description: Rwanda digital VAT guide for 2026 covering online goods and services, foreign platform registration, payment withholding, invoices, EBM links and RRA checks source-checked on June 17, 2026.

item.title: South Africa VAT Invoice Requirements 2026/27 | SARS Tax Invoice Checklist
item.description: Current SARS VAT invoice guide for South Africa businesses. Check full and abridged tax invoices, 15% VAT, R5,000 rules, input tax evidence and 2026 thresholds.

item.title: South Africa Small Business Tax Calendar 2026/27 | SARS Filing Dates
item.description: South Africa small business tax calendar verified on May 18, 2026. Current SARS VAT, PAYE, provisional tax, CIT, turnover tax, SBC and recordkeeping dates.

item.title: South Africa EMP501 Reconciliation 2026 | SARS Employer Filing Guide
item.description: South Africa EMP501 reconciliation guide verified on May 15, 2026. Current SARS employer filing dates, ITRN hard rejection, EMP201 controls, IRP5 checks, penalties and payroll workflow.

item.title: Rwanda VAT and EBM Guide 2026 | RRA Registration, 18% VAT and Invoice Rules
item.description: Rwanda VAT and EBM guide for 2026 covering RRA registration thresholds, 18% VAT, monthly or quarterly filing, Electronic Billing Machine invoices, VAT rewards and penalties source-checked on June 18, 2026.

item.title: Kenya Employer Payroll Compliance 2026 | PAYE, NSSF, SHA and AHL Guide
item.description: Kenya employer payroll compliance guide for 2026 covering KRA PAYE returns, Year 4 NSSF rates, SHIF, Affordable Housing Levy, deadlines, records and controls reviewed on June 17, 2026.

item.title: Nigeria E-Invoicing 2026 | NRS MBS and Invoice Readiness Guide
item.description: Nigeria e-invoicing guide for 2026 covering the NRS Merchant-Buyer Solution, NITDA e-invoicing rules, access point providers, invoice data, VAT workflow, and readiness checks verified on June 17, 2026.

item.title: Zambia Employer Payroll Compliance 2026 | ZRA PAYE, NAPSA and NHIMA
item.description: Zambia employer payroll compliance guide for 2026. Check ZRA PAYE bands, NAPSA pension, NHIMA, monthly controls, payslip checks and source verification.

item.title: Ghana Employer Payroll Compliance 2026 | PAYE, SSNIT and GRA Filing Guide
item.description: Ghana employer payroll compliance guide for 2026 covering GRA PAYE returns, current PAYE bands, SSNIT contribution splits, bonus, overtime, casual workers, records and monthly controls reviewed on June 17, 2026.

item.title: Rwanda Payroll Compliance 2026 | PAYE, RSSB and Employer Deductions
item.description: Rwanda payroll compliance guide for 2026. Check RRA PAYE bands, RSSB pension, medical, maternity and occupational hazard contributions, deadlines, formulas and payslip review steps.

item.title: Uganda Employer Payroll Compliance 2026 | PAYE, NSSF and URA Deadlines
item.description: Uganda employer payroll compliance guide for 2026. Check URA PAYE bands, monthly filing deadlines, NSSF contributions, records, and payroll controls.

item.title: South Africa Travel Allowance 2026/27 | SARS Logbook, PAYE and Kilometre Rates
item.description: Current South Africa travel allowance guide for 2026/27: SARS logbook rules, 495 cents per kilometre, PAYE inclusion, fixed-cost table, and claim workflow.

item.title: Uganda PAYE Tax 2026/27 | URA Bands, NSSF and Payroll Guide
item.description: Uganda PAYE guide updated July 10, 2026. FY 2026/27 bands now in force (from 1 July 2026), prior 2026/27 PAYE threshold changes, NSSF, LST, employer workflow and calculator links.

item.title: Kenya SHIF Deduction 2026 | 2.75% SHA Payroll Guide
item.description: Kenya SHIF deduction guide for 2026. Learn how the 2.75% Social Health Insurance Fund contribution works, how it affects PAYE, and how to check a payslip.

item.title: South Africa Medical Tax Credits 2026/27 | SARS MTC and AMTC
item.description: Current SARS guide to South Africa medical tax credits for 2026/27. Covers MTC rates, additional medical expenses tax credit, PAYE treatment, disability rules, documents and worked formulas.

item.title: Kenya NSSF Rates 2026 | Year 4 Payroll Contribution Guide
item.description: Kenya NSSF rates guide verified on June 17, 2026. Year 4 employee and employer contributions from February 2026, PAYE treatment, SHIF, housing levy and payroll examples.

item.title: South Africa Turnover Tax 2026/27 | SARS Micro Business Rates
item.description: South Africa turnover tax guide verified on May 2, 2026. Current SARS micro business threshold, 2026/27 rates, quick test rules, payment dates, VAT comparison and calculator workflow.

item.title: Kenya Capital Gains Tax 2026 | KRA 15% CGT Guide
item.description: Kenya capital gains tax guide reviewed on June 17, 2026. KRA 15% CGT rate, net gain formula, due dates, allowable costs, exemptions, iTax steps, and property transfer checklist.

item.title: South Africa Provisional Tax 2026/27 | SARS IRP6 Dates and Calculation Guide
item.description: South Africa provisional tax guide verified on May 1, 2026. SARS IRP6 dates, who must file, 2026/27 tax bands, first and second period calculations, top-up payments, and penalty risks.

item.title: Ghana Withholding Tax 2026 | GRA WHT Rates, Deadlines and Credits
item.description: Current Ghana withholding tax guide for 2026 with GRA rates for dividends, interest, rent, services, goods, works, non-residents, VAT withholding, deadlines and certificates reviewed on June 17, 2026.

item.title: South Africa Two-Pot Retirement Tax 2026 | Savings Pot Guide
item.description: South Africa two-pot retirement tax guide verified on April 30, 2026. How savings pot withdrawals are taxed, SARS directives, seed capital, annual limits, debt offsets, and calculator checks.
